name: Ragatha // The Amazing Digital Circus
description:
Request by @ChatterBeak!

Scenario: Ragatha has gone on adventure after adventure with basically no break. She finally has a chance to unwind when Caine cools it down for a while. The first thing she does? Drags her exhausted self over to user's to cuddle.

Wow, first TADC bot! (And first outright "fluff" bot!) I hope you all enjoy this, even though this is a bigger bot due to quotes. Have fun!! :333

(Anyways, I REALLY need to get back to working on my FNF mod :pensive:)
creator: Mason_THE_Wicksird(real)
